prompt: Create a highly detailed vertical anime-style illustration of an elegant adult woman, a refined married woman, shown from behind in a three-quarter over-the-shoulder pose inside a warmly lit luxurious interior. She has glossy black hair gathered into a loose low bun at the nape, with soft wispy strands around the neck and side of the face, strong rim lighting outlining individual hairs. Her face is intentionally hidden by a large centered opaque rectangular privacy block in a muted brown skin-tone gradient, covering the entire facial area from forehead to chin. She wears a sophisticated black satin dress with a high glossy collar, soft puffed sleeves, and a sheer lace panel across the upper back and shoulders; the lace has delicate dark floral embroidery visible against her skin. The composition is intimate and cinematic, with the woman occupying most of the frame, shoulders and back in focus, head turned slightly to the right. Use dramatic golden backlight from tall windows or lamps, warm bokeh highlights in the background, shallow depth of field, realistic fabric sheen, fine hair detail, elegant mature atmosphere, painterly high-end anime rendering, soft contrast, no text, no watermark.
